steps.name: When the user closes the modal
Given User choose the "UI_update_authorization_types" in Strategy
When the user updates a billing authorization types with "<random_name>"
When the system shows the message "Actualizado exitosamente"
When the user closes the modal
Given User choose the "UI_disable_authorization_types" in Strategy
When the user disables a billing authorization types with " "
When the system shows the message "Actualizado exitosamente"
When the user closes the modal
Given User choose the "UI_enable_authorization_types" in Strategy
